indications.text:
Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD)
CONCERTAJ is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit
Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD).
The efficacy of CONCERTAJ in the treatment of ADHD was
established in three controlled trials of children aged 6 to 12
